    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Map<Ship,Ship3D>
    FleetViewBuilder.buildViews(Board board)
     
    Map<Ship,Ship3D>
    ShipPlacementController.getShipViews()
     
    private Map<Ship,Ship3D>
    MainGameController.rebuildBoardView(Board board, javafx.scene.Group boardGroup, boolean hideIntactHulls)
    Builds the 3D shape for every ship on an already-placed board and adds it to the scene, then replays every shot already resolved on that board -- a miss becomes an X mark, a hit or sunk cell is applied to the matching ship via markHit(int).
    Method parameters in com.example.battleship.controller with type arguments of type Ship3D

    Description

    MainGameController.replayHit(Cell cell, Map<Ship,Ship3D> shipViews, Position position)

    MainGameController.replayShotMarks(Board board, Map<Ship,Ship3D> shipViews, javafx.scene.Group boardGroup)

  • Uses of Ship3D in com.example.battleship.view

    Methods in com.example.battleship.view with parameters of type Ship3D
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BoardView3D.addShip(Ship3D ship)
    Adds an already built ship (position and orientation are set at creation time).
    void
    BattlefieldView3D.addShipToMachineBoard(Ship3D ship)
    Adds a ship to the machine's board (in the machine board's own local 0..360 coordinates).
    void
    BattlefieldView3D.addShipToPlayerBoard(Ship3D ship)
    Adds a ship to the player's board (in the player board's own local 0..360 coordinates).

  • Uses of Ship3D in com.example.battleship.view.ships

    Subclasses of Ship3D in com.example.battleship.view.ships
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AircraftCarrier3D
    Aircraft carrier: the largest ship in the fleet, occupies 4 cells.
    class 
    Destroyer3D
    Destroyer: medium-sized ship, occupies 2 cells.
    class 
    Frigate3D
    Frigate: the smallest ship in the fleet, occupies 1 single cell.
    class 
    Submarine3D
    Submarine: occupies 3 cells.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Ship3D
    ShipFactory3D.create(ShipType type, int row, int column, Orientation orientation)
    Creates the 3D shape matching the requested ship type.
